_note: Dummy content for all cities. Delete this file (and remove the import in src/lib/dummy-data.ts) to go fully live.

events.title: Sunday Farmers Market
events.description: Weekly fresh produce, local artisans, live music and street food. Bring your own bag!

events.title: Neighbourhood Clean-Up Drive
events.description: Join us for a 3-hour clean-up of the park and surrounding streets. Gloves and bags provided.

events.title: Tech Founders Meetup
events.description: Open-mic demo night for early-stage founders. 5 min pitches, networking, and free coffee.

events.title: Rooftop Yoga Session
events.description: Sunrise yoga with a certified instructor. All levels welcome. Bring your mat.

events.title: Community Book Swap
events.description: Bring up to 5 books, take up to 5 home. Fiction, non-fiction, children's — everything welcome.

events.title: Street Photography Walk
events.description: A guided 2-hour walk through the old quarter. All camera types welcome. Print showcase next week.

polls.question: Should our neighbourhood get a dedicated cycling lane on the main road?
What should be the new park's central feature?
How often do you use public transport in your city?
Best time for the monthly street market?

tasks.title: Help move furniture — 2nd floor, no lift
tasks.description: Moving a sofa and bookshelf from a 2nd floor flat. Takes about 45 mins with two helpers. I'll cover chai and snacks!

tasks.title: Looking for a Kannada-English translator
tasks.description: Need someone to translate a short legal document (~800 words) from Kannada to English. Can be done remotely.

tasks.title: Dog sitter needed this weekend
tasks.description: Two golden retrievers, super friendly. Need someone to stay over Friday to Sunday. Food and accommodation provided.

tasks.title: Urgent: burst pipe, need a plumber ASAP
tasks.description: Water leaking from under the kitchen sink. Turned off the mains. Need someone within the next hour.

tasks.title: Ride share to the airport at 4 AM?
tasks.description: Flying out early morning, no Uber/Lyft at that hour in my area. Happy to split the cab fare.

crowdfunds.title: Repair the neighbourhood basketball court
crowdfunds.description: The court has been broken for 8 months. We've got municipal approval — just need the funds for new hoops, net repair and resurfacing.

crowdfunds.title: Community library for underprivileged kids
crowdfunds.description: Setting up a free library with 500+ books, reading sessions every weekend, and a small computer lab.

crowdfunds.title: Solar panels for the community centre
crowdfunds.description: Cut electricity bills by 70% and reduce our carbon footprint. Payback period is under 3 years.

crowdfunds.title: Pop-up urban garden — season 2
crowdfunds.description: Last year's garden was a hit. This year we're doubling the plot and adding a composting station open to the whole block.

crowdfunds.title: Emergency flood relief — local families
crowdfunds.description: Heavy rains have displaced 12 families in our area. Funds go directly to temporary housing and food kits.
